description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular form. The exterior features a combination of white and dark gray wall panels, with large, grid-style windows providing ample natural light. The front facade includes a recessed entryway with a covered area and steps leading up to the main door, flanked by symmetrical window arrangements. The rear of the house has a prominent dark gray section that projects outward, adding visual interest and likely housing additional living space. The roof is flat and appears to be finished with a gravel or textured surface, typical of contemporary urban homes. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric shapes, and functional simplicity.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large grid windows, and a mix of white and dark gray exterior panels. The design is minimalist with a recessed entryway and a projecting rear section.
description_view_0: The front view shows a symmetrical facade with a recessed entryway, steps, and large grid windows on both floors.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a flat white wall with evenly spaced windows and a glimpse of the projecting rear section.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the dark gray projecting section with additional windows, contrasting with the white main structure.
description_view_3: The right side view shows a similar window arrangement to the left, with a small window and the side of the projecting rear section visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with steps, covered area, and large glass door
